rows.label: tev068401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Gu Ladha what she is doing here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Gu Ladha if anything is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Gu Ladha about the xenoforms living in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Gu Ladha about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Gu Ladha about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0001
rows.name:
A great Larsian sage once spent a thousand
days secluded atop a steep mountain, seeing
no one until he attained enlightenment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0002
rows.name:
I seek to follow his example and
remain here to face my own weakness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Do not worry—I promise to keep one eye
open for you in case enemies breach your
walls. In the meantime, leave me be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0008
rows.name:
How can you expect me to share my
troubles with a human such as you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0009
rows.name:
I cannot even speak of
them with my own captain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0010
rows.name:
But then again, perhaps an
outsider is just the person to
listen to me without judging...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Forgive me. Might you lend me an
ear sometime, once I work up the
courage? I could use your counsel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0012
rows.name:
If I am to live as a Larsian,
there are things about myself
that I must learn to change.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Unlike the Growth, you humans
seek to meet other alien races
with diplomacy, not violence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0018
rows.name:
I admire this compassionate,
bloodless approach— though I
see it does not always work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0019
rows.name:
The Ma-non, for example, were
here before us, and still they
meet with prejudice and abuse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Some, I am told, have
even met with death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0021
rows.name:
So yes, the path you have chosen is not easy—but I still
wish you luck. Let them call me un-Larsian for saying
it, but fighting is not the only solution for things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0026
rows.name:
My primary job now is to negotiate with
Percy of the provisional government.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0027
rows.name:
She is a wise woman, and thus far
the negotiations have gone well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0028
rows.name:
If only she would stop calling my ears
cute and trying to touch them! Rrrrrr...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0029
rows.name:
Still, my talks with her have made
NLA's present situation much clearer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0030
rows.name:
I thank you, friend, for your sound
advice. I am very glad I took it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0035
rows.name:
In my battles with you, I was
able to confront my weakness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0036
rows.name:
I learned to focus and gained the
courage to attempt Doll training,
which is something I had been avoiding.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0037
rows.name:
No longer shall I be a burden to my
kinsmen on the field of battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev068401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Thank you. I will keep at my training so I
can be more like Go Rogan, striking down
myriad foes and doing my duty to the prince.[ST:wait ]
